events.name: React Copenhagen Conference 2026
events.description: The largest React conference in Scandinavia. Two tracks covering the latest in React 19, Server Components, and the evolving frontend ecosystem. Keynotes from core React team members and community leaders.

events.name: Hackathon: Build with AI
events.description: A 24-hour hackathon where teams of 2–4 build something real using AI APIs. Cash prizes, free food, and mentoring from engineers at leading AI companies. All skill levels welcome.

events.name: JavaScript: Modern Patterns Workshop
events.description: A hands-on full-day workshop covering modern JavaScript patterns: closures, async/await, Promises, modules, and functional techniques. Bring your laptop. Small group, individual coaching included.

events.name: TypeScript Deep Dive
events.description: Go beyond the basics. This workshop covers generics, conditional types, utility types, declaration merging, and integrating TypeScript into large codebases. Prior TypeScript experience required.

events.name: Copenhagen JS Meetup
events.description: Monthly JavaScript community meetup. Two talks from local developers, followed by drinks and networking. This month: state management in 2026 and a live coding session on Vite plugins.

events.name: Full Stack Bootcamp: React & Node
events.description: An intensive two-day bootcamp covering the full stack: React on the frontend, Node.js + Express on the backend, REST APIs, and deployment. Suitable for developers with basic JavaScript knowledge.

events.name: Open Source Summit Nordic
events.description: Three days of talks, panels, and contributor workshops covering open source infrastructure, sustainability, and community building. Featuring maintainers from Linux, Node.js, Python, and more.

events.name: Docker & Kubernetes for Developers
events.description: Learn to containerise your apps, write Dockerfiles, and orchestrate with Kubernetes. This practical workshop takes you from zero to a working multi-container deployment. Bring a laptop with Docker installed.

events.name: Web Performance Masterclass
events.description: A focused half-day on Core Web Vitals, bundle analysis, lazy loading, and caching strategies. Walk away with a clear plan for improving your app's performance scores and real user experience.

events.name: Cybersecurity for Web Developers
events.description: Understand the OWASP Top 10, common web vulnerabilities, and how to defend against them in your own applications. Includes live demonstrations of XSS, CSRF, SQL injection, and secure authentication patterns.

events.name: Frontend Performance Optimization
events.description: Learn practical techniques for improving Core Web Vitals, reducing JavaScript bundle size, optimizing images, and making modern web apps feel faster on real devices and slower networks.

events.name: React Patterns for Scalable Applications
events.description: Explore practical React architecture patterns, component composition, state management trade-offs, reusable hooks, and strategies for keeping large frontend codebases maintainable.

events.name: UX Writing for Digital Products
events.description: Improve product interfaces with clearer microcopy, better error messages, stronger calls to action, and user-focused content patterns for forms, onboarding, and checkout flows.

events.name: Building Accessible Web Interfaces
events.description: Learn how to build inclusive interfaces with semantic HTML, keyboard navigation, ARIA best practices, color contrast checks, and practical accessibility testing workflows.

events.name: Node.js API Development Bootcamp
events.description: Build a production-ready REST API with Node.js, Express, authentication, validation, database integration, structured error handling, and deployment-ready project organization.

events.name: Design Systems in Practice
events.description: Understand how to create, document, and maintain a design system with reusable components, design tokens, accessibility standards, and collaboration between designers and developers.

events.name: Intro to TypeScript for JavaScript Developers
events.description: Get comfortable with TypeScript fundamentals, type annotations, interfaces, generics, narrowing, and how to gradually add type safety to existing JavaScript projects.

events.name: AI Tools for Product Teams
events.description: Discover how product managers, designers, and developers can use AI tools for research synthesis, prototyping, user story generation, testing workflows, and faster product discovery.

events.name: Cloud Deployment with Docker
events.description: Learn how to containerize web applications with Docker, configure environment variables, write Dockerfiles, manage images, and deploy services to a modern cloud platform.

events.name: Cybersecurity for Web Developers
events.description: Understand the OWASP Top 10, common web vulnerabilities, and how to defend against them in your own applications. Includes live demonstrations of XSS, CSRF, SQL injection, and secure authentication patterns.
